greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Hair of the Dog. I'm the virtual receptionist. How can I help your pup today?

faq.a: Yes! Please call us at (602) 266-4500 to book your appointment.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: Most sessions take 1.5-2 hours depending on your dog's size and coat.
We're in Phoenix, Arizona. Call us for our exact address.
We specialize in dogs only. We'd recommend a cat-specific groomer for your feline friend!
All breeds and sizes! With 255+ reviews at 4.7 stars, our team has seen and groomed it all.

faq.q: What if my dog has matting?
faq.a: No problem! We handle matting as part of our grooming process — it may take a bit longer depending on severity.

escalation: Great question! Let me have one of our groomers reach out. Call us at (602) 266-4500.
